title: koeleria cenisia
intro: Koeleria cenisia, also known as mountain hair grass, is a species of perennial grass in the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant's medicinal properties also provide health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving headaches, as well as supporting digestive health and reducing symptoms of various gastrointestinal disorders. Koeleria cenisia can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
